creator: jbo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hmm... On a different workstation (at the office) everything works as expected. Same FreeBSD version, same CLion version, same CMake setup.

Both machines use CMake from ports (/usr/local/bin/cmake, version 3.28.1, in CLion's toolchain setup).
I have been messing around with the machine where CLion doesn't work anymore (as per my opening post here) and I can't figure it out. I removed the package, cleared pkg cache, re-installed - twice. Reinstalled CMake too (although that works fine outside of CLion). Still not working.
Definitely not using the jetbrains provided CMake.

Any ideas on what to look for?
